levels.body: The word “grate” in the poem refers to “a frame of metal bars for holding the fuel in a fireplace or furnace. Hence, the fireplace itself” (“grate, *n*” 4).
worksCited: "grate, *n*.1" *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, March 2023, www.oed.com/view/Entry/80918. Accessed 4 April 2023
